title: Variational Raises $50 Million for On-Chain Derivatives Protocol
message_html: Variational Raises $50 Million for On-Chain Derivatives Protocol ...
snippet: On-chain derivatives trading protocol Variational has raised $50 million in new funding. The company said its Series A round, announced Wednesday (March 20), coincides with the launch of the protocol’s first real-world asset (RWA) markets. “This initial rollout allows traders to access perpetuals on
